    • needsParentheses

      public boolean needsParentheses(boolean isRightChild, int childKind, int parentKind)
      Returns whether parentheses are needed around a formula tag when it appears as a child of formula parentTag.
      Parameters:
      isRightChild - true if tag node is the right child parentTag, false if it is the left child or a unique child
      childKind -
      parentKind -
      Returns:
      true iff parentheses are needed
      Since:
      2.0

    • isSpaced

      public boolean isSpaced(int kind)
